title: Anti-Social Behaviour Surgery - Alice Macdonald
headings: h2: Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North
text_excerpt: Anti-Social Behaviour Surgery - Alice Macdonald Skip to content Alice Macdonald MP Home About Campaigns Health Homes Opportunity Fertility Rights Stay In Touch News Events Contact Me Anti-Social Behaviour Surgery BACK TO NEWS The office is holding an anti-social behaviour specific surgery on Wednesday 27th May from 6-7:30pm, to support constituents dealing with ASB issues in their local area. This event will take place in the Catton Grove area, but anyone living in Norwich North is welcome to attend. Email alice.macdonald.mp@parliament.uk to register your interest in attending. Participants will be offered a slot with one of the office caseworkers, and the location of the event will be shared with attendees closer to the date of the event. Sign-up to my newsletter Name: Email address: I give permission for Alice to contact me with newsletters, updates, and campaigns Leave this field empty if you're human: Alice Macdonald - Labour & Co-operative MP for Norwich North Facebook Twitter Instagram Promoted by David Fullman on behalf of Alice Macdonald MP both at St Marks Church Hall, Hall Road, Norwich, NR1 3HL.
